name: Butter Nut Chewies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch pan with butter flavor Crisco.
3. In a large bowl, beat the eggs until light and foamy using an electric mixer.
4. Beat in the brown sugar, vanilla extract, and Crisco until creamy.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the flour with baking powder and salt.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture. Mix at low speed until blended.
7. Stir in the chopped nuts at low speed. The mixture will be stiff.
8. Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top is light brown.
10. Allow cooling for 10 to 15 minutes before cutting into bars.
